✓ Progress saved
💾 Progress Tracker
Loading…
🔄 Auto-save
Progress is saved automatically to this browser every time you complete a lesson, pass a quiz, or finish a project. Reopen the file anytime and you'll pick up exactly where you left off.
📁 Auto-save to a folder
Pick a folder once (e.g. your Saved Progress folder). After that, a progress.json file is written there automatically on every change — a real backup file you can sync via iCloud. Available in Chrome, Edge, and Brave.
📤 Export backup
Download a .json file with all your progress. Use this to move to a new computer or restore after updating the app to a newer version.
📥 Import backup
Load a previously exported file. Your current browser save will be replaced with the imported data.
⚠️ Reset all progress
Permanently clears every lesson, quiz, and project record. Cannot be undone — export first if you want a backup.
